name: Grape Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup AM Whole Wheat Pastry Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix dry ingredients: blue cornmeal, whole wheat pastry flour, baking powder, salt (if using), nutmeg, and chopped nuts.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the beaten egg or egg replacer, vegetable oil, natural sweetener, plain yogurt, grape juice, and lemon extract until well combined.
3. Gradually add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined. The batter should be thin but will thicken as it sits for a few minutes.
4. Grease 12 muffin tins with vegetable oil or line them with paper liners.
5. Fill each muffin cup about two-thirds full with the batter.
6. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
7. Remove from oven and let cool in the tins for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to serve.
This recipe can also be used to make pancakes.
